Mastermind Live Teaching with Bas Wouters | session 3
Deep-dive on Reciprocity
Join Bas Wouters for a comprehensive session focused on the powerful principle of Reciprocity. This session delves into the
psychological underpinnings of why people feel compelled to return favors and how this instinct can be ethically harnessed in
various aspects of personal and professional life. Bas will illustrate the principle with practical examples, showing how to effectively
and responsibly apply Reciprocity to enhance relationships and influence outcomes. Prepare for an interactive learning experience
that will equip you with valuable insights into one of the most fundamental aspects of human behavior.
Mastermind Teaching
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 1 --
